task_completion.description: Verify the survey is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a survey titled 'CARDIA Follow-Up Study - Participant Intake Form 2024' in the LimeSurvey admin interface (e.g., in the survey list or survey summary header).

task_completion.description: Verify the two required question groups are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Demographic Information' and 'Contact Preferences' in the survey structure menu or group list.

task_completion.description: Verify the 5 demographic questions are created with correct types and set as mandatory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for questions 'email' (Short free text), 'age' (Numerical), 'zipcode' (Short free text), 'income' (Numerical), and 'children' (Numerical) under the Demographic Information group. They should have a mandatory indicator (often a red asterisk or 'Mandatory: Yes' in settings).

task_completion.description: Verify the strict field-level validations are applied to the demographic questions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for question settings, logic views, or preview screens showing: email validation for 'email', min 18 / max 99 for 'age', regex '\d{5}' for 'zipcode', min 0 / max 10000000 for 'income', and min 0 / max 30 for 'children'.

task_completion.description: Verify the contact preferences questions are created with correct options and limits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'contactmethod' as a List (Radio) with options (Email, Phone, Text Message, Postal Mail) set as mandatory, and 'notes' as Long free text (optional) with a maximum character limit of 500 in the question settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Active' status badge, a green checkmark next to the survey status, or the presence of a 'Stop this survey' button instead of 'Activate this survey' in the survey summary.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web GUI to create the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface, rather than a terminal executing API scripts or direct database SQL inserts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the survey title or active status.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools pane being used to modify HTML text directly.

integrity.description: Verify the survey activation was performed properly through the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the activation confirmation steps or the genuine active survey summary page, not just a text editor with the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey must be titled 'CARDIA Follow-Up Study - Participant Intake Form 2024'. It requires exactly 2 groups and 7 questions. Validation rules to verify: 'age' (min 18, max 99), 'zipcode' (regex \d{5}), 'income' (min 0, max 10000000), 'children' (min 0, max 30), and 'notes' (max 500 characters). 'email' must have email validation. 'contactmethod' must be a Radio list with Email, Phone, Text Message, Postal Mail.
